products.name: The Do Nothing Button
products.blurb: One button! Zero functions! Press it in an emergency — there will be no emergencies!
products.description: At last! A button for the modern citizen who has pressed enough! Mount it anywhere and marvel: depressing it initiates nothing, releasing it concludes nothing! There will be no emergencies!
specs: Machined aluminum on a solid plinth
The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I pressed it for a century, citizen. Nothing! It works perfectly.

products.name: The Loading Bar
products.blurb: Holds at 94% — forever! The task that can never disappoint you by finishing! Owners report profound calm!
products.description: Behold the bar that science cannot finish! It holds at 94% today, tomorrow, and forever! Hang it in the parlor and enjoy the one task that will never disappoint you by ending!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: Ninety-four percent, citizen! The final six belong to no man!

products.name: The Yesterday Clock
products.blurb: Tells the time — yesterday! Accurate to the minute, one day late! Punctuality, freed from the tyranny of the present!
products.description: The timepiece of tomorrow tells the time of yesterday! Every glance reveals, with total accuracy, what time it was this hour one day ago. You can never be late again, citizen, because you already were! Punctuality, freed at last from the tyranny of the present.
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I consult it every morning, citizen, to learn what yesterday held. Astonishing!

products.name: The Monochrome Cube
products.blurb: Every face the same! Arrives solved — stays solved! 100% completion, guaranteed!
products.description: The puzzle that respects your time! Every face arrives the same color, solved at the factory by our finest machines. Twist it all you like, citizen: victory is permanent!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I have solved it forty thousand times without moving, citizen!

products.name: The Singular Jigsaw
products.blurb: One piece! 1000% completion in seconds! The moment you open it is the moment you have won!
products.description: One piece! One glorious piece! Open the box and the picture is complete before your very eyes. Frame it at once, champion, for you have already won!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: The greatest puzzle, citizen, is no puzzle at all!

products.name: The Deck of Agreement
products.blurb: Fifty-two identical cards! Every hand a tie! No winners, no losers — civilization, perfected!
products.description: Fifty-two cards, every one identical! Deal any game you please and watch every hand end in perfect, gentlemanly agreement. No winners! No losers! No arguments at the table, ever again!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I played myself for a decade, citizen. We tied every hand. Civilization!

products.name: The Ceremonial Pen
products.blurb: A pen with a 47-step activation ritual! Leather-bound manual included! Bureaucracy you can hold!
products.description: Writing, elevated to ritual! This magnificent instrument activates only upon completion of the 47-step sequence, documented in the accompanying leather-bound manual. Bureaucracy has never felt so luxurious!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I completed the ritual once, citizen. I wept at step forty.

products.name: The Diurnal Nightlight
products.blurb: Illuminates — only in daylight! In darkness, it rests! Guidance offered when you can already see!
products.description: The nightlight, perfected! Its advanced sensor illuminates exclusively during daylight hours, offering guidance precisely when you can already see. In darkness it rests, citizen, as all things should!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: At noon, citizen, it shines like a champion!

products.name: The Retrospective Alarm
products.blurb: Wakes you to yesterday morning! It cannot make you late — yesterday has already forgiven you!
products.description: Wake to the news of yesterday morning! This handsome alarm rings faithfully for a day that has already forgiven you. It cannot make you late, citizen. That is a scientific fact!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I rise every morning victorious over a day long past!

products.name: The Connected Stone
products.blurb: It pairs! It is a rock! Science's greatest triumph fits in your palm — and does nothing with it!
products.description: At last! From beyond the void comes a stone that pairs with your device in seconds! Once paired, the companion application displays a single, glorious confirmation: “Yes. It’s a stone.” No firmware updates are planned. None are required! Own the rock that science could not improve!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: I carried this stone across three dimensions, citizen. It did nothing the entire way. Magnificent!

products.name: The Airplane-Mode Router
products.blurb: It blinks! It hums! Connected to nothing — and it will connect you to nothing, with total confidence!
products.description: A router of tremendous presence! It blinks with authority! It hums with purpose! It is connected to absolutely nothing, and it will connect you to nothing, with the quiet confidence of the modern age!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: The strongest connection, citizen, is none at all!

products.name: The Still-Hot Mug
products.blurb: The mug that knows! Its display reads STILL HOT — always! Not always right. Always certain!
products.description: The intelligent vessel with a single conviction! Regardless of temperature, contents, or the march of time, its display proclaims STILL HOT. It is not always correct, citizen. It is always certain!
specs: The edge of the observable universe
products.quote: Certainty, citizen! The rarest brew of all!
